nasb.text: Egypt rises like the Nile, Even like the rivers whose waters surge about; And He has said, “I will rise and cover that land; I will surely destroy the city and its inhabitants.”

esv.text: Egypt rises like the Nile, like rivers whose waters surge. He said, ‘I will rise, I will cover the earth, I will destroy cities and their inhabitants.’

cnv.text: 埃及像尼羅河上漲， 像江河的水翻騰； 它說：‘我要上漲，淹蓋大地； 我要毀滅城鎮和城裡的居民。’

ccb.text: 埃及如尼罗河涨溢， 如江水奔腾。 她说，‘我要涨溢，淹没大地， 毁灭城邑和其中的居民。’
